errors.interests: Please select at least one interest.

errors.referral: Please let us know how you heard about us.

organisation.title: Selling tickets or managing bookings
organisation.description: I represent a business that creates activities, offers booking, rents out vehicles or equipment, or sells tickets to the public.

invited.title: Joining an existing organization
invited.description: I've been invited to join an organisation on Ticketwaze. I need to set up my individual account and connect to my team with the appropriate permissions.

first.1: Thank you for choosing Ticketwaze. You're joining a platform built to streamline the way organisations sell tickets, manage bookings, and connect with their audience—while giving attendees a seamless way to discover and access experiences.
first.2: Before you proceed, we'll ask you a few brief questions to understand how you intend to use Ticketwaze. Your answers will help us configure your dashboard, tailor your permissions, and ensure you're directed to the correct environment, whether you're here to manage activities as an organisation or to discover and book experiences as an attendee.
first.3: This setup should take no more than two minutes. You can always adjust these preferences later from your account settings.

third.question: How do you usually book tickets?
third.solo: I go to activities by myself.
third.group: I buy for large groups or corporate outings.

fourth.question: Do you want to discover local activities or are you planning to travel?
fourth.local: Show me activities near my current city.
fourth.travel: I am looking for experiences in specific destinations.

sixth.question: How did you hear about us?

last.1: Thank you for completing the setup. Your interests and preferences will be used to personalize activities recommendations, show relevant listings, and improve your overall experience on Ticketwaze. You can review or update your preferences at any time from your account settings.
last.2: Please note: Ticketwaze does not share your personal data or interest profile with third parties without your explicit consent. Any communication from organisations will be subject to your notification preferences, which you can adjust at any time.
last.3: By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out to our support team via the Help Center or email us at support@ticketwaze.com.

invitedIntro.1: Before you can access the organisation dashboard and begin collaborating, you'll need to set up your individual Ticketwaze account.
invitedIntro.2: This quick setup allows us to personalize your experience, establish your account credentials, and securely link you to the organisation. You'll be asked a few questions to configure your profile and confirm your role preferences.

invitedLast.1: Thank you for completing your account setup. Your dashboard will be configured to reflect the permissions and access level assigned to your role within the organisation.
invitedLast.2: Please note: Your access is limited to the features and data permitted by your assigned role. If you believe you require additional access or if your responsibilities change, please contact the organisation owner or admin to adjust your permissions. Ticketwaze does not share your personal information or activity data with third parties without your explicit consent.
invitedLast.3: Important: We will now redirect you to the organisation dashboard. For security purposes, you will be required to log in again using your freshly created Ticketwaze account credentials before accessing your dashboard.
invitedLast.4: By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Your use of the organisation dashboard is also subject to the organisation's internal policies as defined by the account owner. If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out to our support team via the Help Center or email us at support@ticketwaze.com.

errors.name: Please enter your organisation name.
errors.service: Please select at least one service.
errors.referral: Please let us know how you heard about us.

organisations.title: Welcome to TicketWaze
organisations.description: Best for a platform that handles business and enterprise users
organisations.setup: Let's set up your Ticketwaze workspace

first.question: What is the name of your organisation?

second.question: What type of organisation are you building
second.single: I am a solo entrepreneur, DJ, or instructor.
second.agency: I have a team managing multiple activities.
second.entreprise: I represent a venue, stadium, or large company.

third.question: What type of services do you primarily offer?

fifth.question: How did you hear about us?

last.1: Thank you for completing the setup. Your organisation profile will be configured based on your selected services, team structure, and preferences. You can now begin creating activities, managing bookings, and inviting team members to collaborate.
last.2: Important: We will now redirect you to the organisation dashboard. For security purposes, you will be required to log in again using your freshly created Ticketwaze account credentials before accessing your dashboard.
last.3: Please note: Ticketwaze does not share your organisation's data or sales information with third parties without your explicit consent. Payouts will be processed according to your need, subject to verification and applicable processing timelines. You can review or update your organisation settings, and team roles at any time from your dashboard.
last.4: By proceeding, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Terms of Use, Seller Agreement, and Privacy Policy. These documents outline your responsibilities as an organiser, including refund policies, payout terms, and platform fees. If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out to our seller support team via the Help Center or email us at organisations@ticketwaze.com.

Event.notInvited: Access Restricted: This is a private activity visible only to invited participants.
Event.share_text: Spread the word and invite your friends! Share this activity on social media or via direct message.
Event.reportEventDescription: Help us keep the platform safe. Share details about any issues with this activity.
Event.reportOrganisationDescription: Help us keep the platform safe. Share details about any issues with this organisation.
Event.question: What issue do you have with this activity?
Event.question2: What issue do you have with this organisation?
Event.validStatus: You must select a valid reason
Event.name: Full Name
Event.ticketWarning1: Your ticket is personal—don’t share it.
Event.returnDescription: By returning your ticket, you’ll permanently release it back to the organisation. This action is irreversible, meaning you won’t be able to reclaim the ticket later. Please note that platform and transaction fees are not refundable.
Event.freeTicketReturnWarning: This is a free activity. If you return your ticket, you won’t be able to purchase another one afterward.

Checkout.purchased_text: Your purchase is confirmed! Access it anytime in upcoming activities or check your email for a copy

ticket.title: Buy Ticket
ticket.select: Select a ticket type to continue
ticket.ticketWarning: Tickets are non-refundable. All sales are final.

recipient.title: Recipient
recipient.someone: I’m purchasing this ticket for someone else

recipient.warning: Please double-check the information before submitting. If these details are incorrect, the person may not be able to access their ticket.
recipient.name: Full Name

payment.title: Payment
payment.nopayment: This activity is completely free of charge. No payment is required to complete your registration. Just continue to confirm your ticket and you’re all set.
payment.secured: Your security matters to us. Every transaction is processed through encrypted channels and monitored in real time to prevent fraud and ensure your personal information remains protected. Our systems are supervised by trusted partners and comply with the highest industry standards for data and payment security.

Liked.title: Like activities
Liked.noEvent: You haven’t liked any activities yet. Browse upcoming activities and tap the ❤️ to save your favorites!
